questionHtml: Calculate the amount of money in her account at the start of 2024. Give your answer to two decimal places.
markschemeHtml:
N=24

I=4

PV=±1000

PMT=±100

P / Y=12

C / Y=12          (M1)(A1)

 

Note: Award M1 for an attempt to use a financial app in their technology (i.e. at least three entries seen, but not necessarily correct).

Approaches that use the compound interest formula receive no marks.

Award A1 for correct values of PV and PMT (signs must be the same) and a correct value of N.

 

FV=($)3577.43          A1

 

Note: Award at most (M1)(A1)A0 if the final answer is negative or not rounded to 2 dp.

 

[3 marks]
